channel.title: Irteza Asad Rizvi — Writing
channel.description: Technical deep-dives on Node.js internals, AI and LLM engineering, adversarial machine learning, DevOps, and web security.

item.title: Breaking my own spam classifier: a hands-on tour of adversarial examples
item.description: Training a spam classifier, then systematically breaking it with perturbed inputs — a hands-on walkthrough of adversarial examples in NLP.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: How Node.js Handles 10,000 Requests
item.description: Exploring event-driven architecture, the event loop, and why non-blocking I/O outperforms thread-per-request models.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: How to Deploy a Basic MERN App on a Linux Server/VPS
item.description: Step-by-step deployment with Node 22, PM2, Nginx, HTTPS via Certbot, and automated deployment aliases.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: When Your VPS Gets Hacked: How I Found a Miner Running On Our Server
item.description: A security incident report — detection, forensics, and hardening after finding xmrig on a compromised VPS.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: ipconfig in macOS, Linux | Get macOS IP Address
item.description: Quick reference for finding your IP address across macOS and Linux using ifconfig, ip, and related networking commands.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Turn a Phrase into a Strong Password (and Why It Works)
item.description: Phrase-based password generation combining familiarity with entropy for credentials that are both memorable and secure.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Your Digital Keys: Why a Strong Password Is Your First Line of Defense
item.description: Password security fundamentals — brute-force attacks, dictionary attacks, and supplementary measures like 2FA.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Inspect an iPhone Safari Tab from Your Mac (The Clean Way)
item.description: Remote debugging iOS Safari pages using Mac's Web Inspector — console, elements, network, and breakpoints.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Dive into V8: How JavaScript Gets Supercharged (and Sometimes Slows Down)
item.description: V8 engine internals — parsing, Ignition bytecode, TurboFan compilation, and deoptimization triggers.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: How ChatGPT-4o Works: A Developer's Dive
item.description: GPT-4o's multimodal capabilities — native training across text, voice, vision, and real-time latency improvements.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: How Image Generation Works in ChatGPT (Without the Magic Wand)
item.description: Text-to-image mechanics — diffusion models, text encoding, iterative denoising, and current limitations.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Autocomplete: Make Your Forms Smarter
item.description: Leveraging the HTML autocomplete attribute to build smarter, faster forms with zero extra JavaScript.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: How I Built a Funny Chatbot with ChatGPT and Node.js
item.description: Express.js meets OpenAI API — building a personality-driven chatbot with system prompt engineering.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Play Arcade on a Docker Container
item.description: Running classic arcade games inside a Docker container — a fun intro to containerization and port mapping.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: AWS EC2 101 | EC2 Concepts
item.description: Core EC2 concepts — instance types, AMIs, security groups, and getting started with AWS compute.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Get Started with Dockerfile
item.description: A practical guide to writing Dockerfiles — FROM, RUN, COPY, multi-stage builds, and best practices.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Optimize Your JavaScript Code for SEO
item.description: Techniques for making JavaScript-heavy apps search-engine friendly — SSR, lazy loading, and structured data.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi

item.title: Get 100 PageScore for Nuxt Application
item.description: Achieving a perfect Lighthouse score in Nuxt — image optimization, code splitting, and performance tuning.
item.dc:creator: Irteza Asad Rizvi
